---
title: "Stats Demo"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(jsonlite)
library(htmltools)

refs <- fromJSON("references.json")
accent <- "#E07B39"

n_total   <- nrow(refs)
n_journal <- sum(refs$type == "journal")
n_conf    <- sum(refs$type == "conference")
n_awards  <- sum(!is.na(refs$award) & nchar(refs$award) > 0)
yr_min    <- min(as.integer(refs$year))
yr_max    <- max(as.integer(refs$year))

HTML(sprintf(
  '<div style="margin:0.5em 0 1.2em 0; padding:0.6em 1em;
               background:#f9f9f9; border-left:3px solid %s;
               font-size:0.9em; color:#444;">
     <strong style="color:%s;">%d</strong> publications
     &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     <strong style="color:%s;">%d</strong> journal articles
     &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     <strong style="color:%s;">%d</strong> conference papers
     &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     &#127942; <strong style="color:%s;">%d</strong> awards
     &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     %d – %d
   </div>',
  accent,
  accent, n_total,
  accent, n_journal,
  accent, n_conf,
  accent, n_awards,
  yr_min, yr_max
))
```
